name: Coiled Cobra
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a cobra rising up from a coiled body with its wide hood spread open, a pattern of scales on the hood, alert round eyes, and a forked tongue flicking out of its mouth, looking proud not scary

name: Patterned Python
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a thick python wound into several smooth loops, its long body covered in large blotchy diamond-shaped patches, a rounded head resting on top of a coil, calm half-closed eyes

name: Rattlesnake on the Rocks
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a rattlesnake coiled on a flat desert rock with its head raised and tail lifted to show a segmented rattle at the tip, bold diamond patterns down its back, a small cactus and a few pebbles beside it

name: Friendly Garden Snake
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a slim friendly garden snake gliding through tall blades of grass with a few little flowers, a long thin striped body curving in an S-shape, a small smiling face and tiny forked tongue

name: Baby Snake Hatching
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a cute tiny baby snake poking its head out of a cracked egg with big sparkly eyes, a short curled body just emerging from the shell, two more spotted snake eggs resting in a soft nest beside it

name: Snake in a Tree
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a long green snake draped and looped over a leafy tree branch, its body hanging down in gentle curves, a few large leaves around it, head lifted with a curious expression and a flicking tongue

name: Snake Charmer Basket
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a cobra rising gracefully out of a woven wicker basket as if charmed by music, its hood partly spread, the basket decorated with simple patterns, a couple of musical notes floating in the air nearby

name: Two Snakes Twisting
subject: animals/snake
prompt: two friendly snakes of slightly different sizes twined gently around each other in a loose spiral, each with its own pattern of stripes and dots, both heads turned toward one another with happy smiles

name: Snake Head Close-Up
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a large close-up portrait of a snake's head facing forward, big detailed eyes, scaly textured skin around the brow, nostrils, and a long forked tongue extending from an open mouth, filling most of the frame

name: Coral Snake Stripes
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a slender coral snake stretched in a long wavy line across the page, its body marked with clear bands of alternating wide and narrow stripes ringing the whole body, a small blunt head and quiet eyes

name: Sea Snake in the Waves
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a sea snake swimming through ocean water with a paddle-shaped flattened tail, its body rippling in gentle curves, a few wave lines, small fish, and bubbles around it as it glides forward

name: Cute Cartoon Snake
subject: animals/snake
prompt: a chubby cute cartoon snake curled into one simple thick coil with a big round smiling face, large happy eyes, rosy cheeks, and a tiny tongue, a few simple round dots along its back, easy for toddlers
